summary: Verified Editorial Board split-page and image-only slider changes. All 6 acceptance criteria pass after frontend cache refresh. NOTE: Initial testing showed stale bundle.js served with old slider (title/subtitle/blue overlay). Required clearing webpack cache + supervisor restart to see new build. Users with cached browser JS may still see the old slider until a hard reload.
action_items: Minor cleanup: /app/frontend/src/components/public/PublicNavbar.jsx line 15 - DEFAULT_NAV fallback still points 'Editorial Board' -> '/journal'. Update to '/journal/editorial-board' to keep code consistent with the DB-driven navbar (only affects environments with no CMS navbar data).
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.jsx (444 lines): Getting large; consider extracting Hero/Stats/Membership/News sections into own components in future.
SliderAdmin.jsx: useCallback fetchSliders missing 'headers' dep (ESLint warning) - not a functional bug since token is read from localStorage on load.
EditorialBoardPage.jsx and JournalPage.jsx duplicate the Avatar component and API resolvers - candidate for shared util/component.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend served from craco dev server; occasionally webpack cache serves stale bundle. If UI mismatch with source, run: `rm -rf /app/frontend/node_modules/.cache/default-development && sudo supervisorctl restart frontend`. Journal API /api/public/journal returns empty board array in this env (board:[]) so /journal/editorial-board shows 'coming soon' placeholder - this is data-driven, not a UI bug.
verified_features: GET /journal shows only journal info (no editorial board section) - 0 board sections found
GET /journal/editorial-board renders separate page with 'Editorial Board' hero + journal name subtitle
Navbar 'Editorial Board' link href = /journal/editorial-board (verified via DOM + click navigation)
Public homepage slider renders only with data-testid=slider-image-{idx}; 0 h1/title, 0 subtitle, 0 CTA buttons, 0 gradient overlays inside slider
Admin /admin/sliders modal contains only 'Slider Image' upload + 'Or paste image URL' + 'Active' checkbox; no title/subtitle/link inputs
Admin /admin/sliders shows grid layout with slider-item-{idx} cards (2 items) instead of list-with-title-column
